_doc: Schema example for weather_data['applicability_map'].
Each correction module exposes describe_applicability() returning a list
of entries with the shape below. The collector concatenates the lists into
weather_data['applicability_map']['layers'] each tick. corrections_debug.html
renders Section D from the whole list and renders per-layer slices by
filtering on layer_id.
Field shape:
layer_id     — stable ID for ordering/filtering ('L3', 'L4', 'L5', 'L6', 'C1', ...)
name         — human-readable name shown on the page
category     — 'general-purpose' | 'specialist' | 'confidence'
fields       — list of per-field gating descriptors (see below)
Per-field descriptor:
field         — short code matching pair-log field names ('t', 'ws', 'cc', ...)
fires_when    — free-text predicate; first cut, structured later if Section D needs to compute on it
gated_by      — name of the module-level constant the gate reads, or omitted if always-on
current_state — what the gate is doing RIGHT NOW (resolves the constant for the reader)
notes         — optional, anything the reader needs to interpret the row
C1 NOTE: confidence layer doesn't fit 'fires for field X' cleanly — it
applies along axes (transition, post-frontal, pressure trend, etc.) that
cross fields. Open design question per project_applicability_map_design.md;
the entry below uses an 'axes' subkey as a placeholder.

fields.fires_when: L3_FIELDS contains ws (always, at every lead)
fields.current_state: calm-wind gate off; firing for all ws leads
fields.notes: Flipping CALM_GATE_ENABLED to True will skip L3 ws/wg at any lead where fc_wind_speed_post_l2 < 3 mph

fields.fires_when: L3_FIELDS contains wg (always, at every lead)
fields.current_state: calm-wind gate off; firing for all wg leads

fields.fires_when: L3_FIELDS contains ch (always, at every lead)
L3_FIELDS contains cm (always, at every lead)
L3_FIELDS contains pp (always, at every lead)
L4_FIELDS contains ch (always, at every lead)
L4_FIELDS contains cc (always, at every lead)
fields.notes: v0.6.254 regime analysis: cc L4 LOSES in frontal regime only; per-(field, regime, lead_band) whitelist is the right refinement

fields.fires_when: ENABLED AND sb_active_forecast(lead) is True AND fc_wind_octant(lead) in {S, SE, SW}
fields.current_state: ENABLED True; warming branch active, cooling branch disabled v0.6.259
fields.notes: Sb_off branch returns 0.0 since v0.6.259 (cooling Δ ≤ -2°F was doubling MAE; r5_cove_analysis cooling gradient FAIL'd threshold). See project_l6_l2_double_counting_hypothesis.

layers.name: Confidence layer

axes.name: Regime transition
axes.applies_to_bands: MAE inflated → widen σ for affected (field, band) cells per curated table

layers._axes_note: Placeholder shape — full C1 entry needs sub-design (see project_applicability_map_design.md open questions). Real entry would enumerate all live C1 axes (C1a/C1c/C1e/C1f) and the (field, band) cells each axis modifies.
